context: Claude was showing a WebFetch permission prompt (code.visualstudio.com) but the indicator showed working instead of waiting_permission
rootCause: Subagent PreToolUse events cleared waiting_permission. PermissionRequest fired at 09:11:21.312 and 09:11:22.281 but PreToolUse at 09:11:22.281 and 09:11:23.461 overrode them back to working.
fixed: Sticky waiting states guard in applyTransition — PreToolUse/SubagentStart/PreCompact no longer clear waiting states (2026-02-24)

context: Stop hook fired at 13:11:44 while backgrounded subagents were still running; SubagentStop for aee66d5 and a0aed24 did not arrive until 13:35 and 13:37 (~24 min later) with no intervening UserPromptSubmit. The card showed white/stopped (and played the completion tone) while Claude was still busy.
rootCause: Stop was treated as session-done regardless of outstanding background work.
fixed: Background ledger + working_background (yellow) state: Stop routes to working_background when the ledger is non-empty, and drains to stopped (firing the tone then) when the last subagent/bash/monitor/workflow finishes (2026-07-13)

context: A completion tone dinged and the icon flashed white then back to orange while Claude was actively working. voiceop (reference) did not detect any stop. Claude had auto-compacted its context mid-turn.
rootCause: SessionStart hook with source=compact fired at 14:28:55 while working; the state machine treated compact SessionStart as stopped. Claude auto-resumed (jsonl:assistant) 9s later. Across all 42 historical compact events, every one fired while working and resumed — the rule was never correct.
fixed: Removed the SessionStart:compact -> stopped transition; SessionStart no longer affects state. Idle is signalled only by Stop; resume by the next assistant entry (2026-07-13)
